DELEGATION: orchestrator acting as fact-checker per Stage-04 spec. All 5 Stage-03 priority flags + supporting stats re-verified via WebSearch against named primary/guideline sources. (1) L. reuteri DSM 17938: VERIFIED CLEAN — manuscript references L. reuteri generically and explicitly teaches the species-vs-strain caveat, asserts NO strain-to-trial mismatch (the exact risk flagged); 2025 meta-analysis PMC11777987 supports eradication+tolerability. (2) S. boulardii: VERIFIED — tolerability/AAD-reduction only (RR ~0.36 diarrhoea), explicitly not an eradication agent, matches PMC11860874, no overclaim. (3) NNT 332: VERIFIED mathematically — RR 0.61 (95% CI 0.47-0.79), NNT 332 per PMC12010618/BMC Gastroenterology 2025; plain-English gloss correct. (4) Clarithromycin 22.2-31.5%: VERIFIED vs ACG 2024 guideline, range preserved. (5) 76%/15.6M: VERIFIED vs Nature Medicine Sep 2025 (s41591-025-03793-6) + IARC pr368, exact match. Supporting (28.7% failure PMC10688878, 27-41% fail-despite-susceptibility PMC11807671, rifabutin PMC6406425, furazolidone PMC8467492, regional resistance labelled, mastic gum, sulforaphane, anxiety) all VERIFIED and correctly hedged. ZERO FIX/REMOVE/SOFTEN required — writing never exceeded locked facts. Output: FACT-CHECK-REPORT.md.
